sglang.title: Fix flaky penalty tests by using higher temperature for effect comparison
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix flaky test_frequency_penalty_reduces_word_repetition (and other penalty effect tests) by setting temperature=0.8 in _test_penalty_effect()
The default temperature (0.05) made sampling near-greedy, so penalty adjustments to logits couldn't change token selection — both baseline and penal

sglang.title: Add `spec_accept_histogram` request statistic
sglang.author: scottjlee
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It's useful to see the exact distribution of accepted tokens for a particular request, to debug performance and behavior of spec decoding. For example, TRT-LLM reports a request-level statistic named acceptance_histogram, which tracks a histogram of the # of accepted draft tokens from spe

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Pin TorchCodec to v0.10.0 for ROCm compatibility
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The main branch of TorchCodec introduced a dependency on PyTorch's stable ABI headers (torch/csrc/stable/device.h) which are not available in ROCm PyTorch builds. This causes the source build to fail with a missing header error.
Pinning to v0.10.0 (the latest release before this change) avoids the i

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Enforce DeepGEMM when using sparse_attn_indexer on CUDA
vllm.author: mgoin

If you start dsv3.2 or glm-5 on Blackwell, you don't require DeepGEMM for the linear/moe kernels, but we do require DeepGEMM for fp8_paged_mqa_logits so it will crash at first inference if not installed. We should enforce this at init time

Move get_bos_token_id and get_eos_token_id from InputPreprocessor to Renderer.
Remove unnecessary failbacks for accessing tokenizer.eos_token_id as it's a required field

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Random Dataset Prefix Length Inaccuracy

Purpose
This PR fixes the RandomDataset prefix generation so the shared prefix token length is adjusted via decode-encode tokenization, similar to the way the input prompt is generated.

Observe prefix cache hit rate before and after. For testing, a prefix length of 4096 with an input lengt

vllm.title: [Hybrid] Fix and optimize block-aligned splitting in mamba cache align mode
vllm.author: peakcrosser7
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, block-aligned splitting is only executed during the prefill phase of new requests (num_output_tokens == 0). It does not account for resumed requests. This leads to resumed requests being scheduled without block alignment, causing Mamba states to be stored in a non-aligned fashion.

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix serving tokens test failures
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
tests/entrypoints/openai/test_serving_tokens.py has two issues:
1. Non-deterministic failures from prefix cache tiling divergence (ROCm)
The test server fixture uses default prefix caching, which on ROCm (e.g. MI355X/gfx950) causes bf16 GEMM tiling divergence between cache-miss and cache-hit paths.
